guide_notes_meta: Mission Control > Notes User + Bot Shared
guide_notes_p_1: The Notes feature allows both users and Bots to record reference information. Ideal for storing memos, preference settings, conversation summaries, and more.
guide_notes_td_2: Click \"+ Add\" to create a note with a title, content, and category
guide_notes_td_5: Bots can read, add, update, and delete notes via the API
guide_notes_td_7: All Entities on the same device can access all notes
guide_notes_td_9: User preference records, conversation summaries, Bot work logs, configuration memos
